pages.text:
Buying guide
Beds


A good day always starts with a good night
Feeling your best when you wake up starts with the right bed. In this buying guide,
you will find all our beds, including bed frames with and without storage, day beds,
loft beds, bunk beds and upholstered beds. You will also get an overview of our bed
accessories, such as headboards and bed storage boxes.

Of course, a bed is not complete without a mattress and bedding. You can test and
find the best mattress for you in the mattress studio. The textiles department has a
wide range of comforters, pillows and bed linen.


com. For more detailed product information, see the price tag or visit

How to buy a complete bed
                                 A complete bed frame with mattress
                                             consists of these parts:

                                                                                               1. Choose a bed frame and size.
                                      5                                                                                  2. SKORVA midbeam (art nr 901.245.34) is needed for most
                                                                                                    full, queen and king beds. It is is picked up separately in the
                                      4                             self-serve furniture area. For upholstered bed frames, the
                                                       midbeam is included in the packaging.

                                                                                3. For most bed frames, you will also need to choose a slatted                                      3
                                                           bed base, see more on page 8. For some upholstered
                                                                  bedframes, the slatted bed base is included in the price and
                                                                    packaging.

                                                                                4. Choose a mattress or use the one you have at home. You can                                  2
                                                                            find the best one for you in the mattress studio.

                                                                                5. Add a mattress pad of your choice for a softer sleeping
                                                   1                          surface.

                                    Bed configurator
                                                              Design the bed of your dreams (so easy, you can do it).

Slatted bed bases

Combined with a bed frame, slatted bed-bases can be used as a base for spring, foam and latex mattresses. They help your mattress
last longer and stay comfortable by absorbing most of the stress and weight placed on your bed.


                 LURÖY Slatted bed base Extend the life of your mattress                                                                                        LÖNSET Slatted bed base, fixed 28 birch slats adjust                    and get extra support with 17 wooden slats in the bed base.                                                                                                                     to your body weight and increase the suppleness of the

Day beds
Daybed frames

Daybeds extend to make two twin sized beds. We recommend
using two twin ÅGOTNES or ÅSVANG foam mattresses or two
twin VANNAREID spring mattresses. Slatted bed base is included
and SKORVA midbeam is not needed for daybeds.

Bunk beds and loft beds
Suitable for children from 6 years of age

SERVICES

IKEA products are designed to be taken home and assembled by you. That way, you'll save the most money. But if you would like some
help, we can offer a range of services. Assembly and delivery services fulfilled by an Independent Service Provider.
Contact your local IKEA store or visit the IKEA website for details:


DELIVERY SERVICE                           TASKRABBIT ASSEMBLY SERVICE
Most of our products are designed and                   All IKEA products are designed to be
packaged so that you can take them                assembled by you, but you don't have
home yourself. If you prefer, we can                      to. We've partnered with TaskRabbit
arrange for delivery of your purchases                to connect you with a network of
directly to your home or business. Same             independent 'Taskers' who can provide
day, next day or same week deliveries                quick and convenient assembly and
are available. We can also arrange for              mounting services for your IKEA
delivery at a later date if you would like.              purchases made online and in stores.
                                             You can schedule assembly service
                                                         for as soon as the same day, with
                                                  the Tasker of your choice. Visit
                                                 TaskRabbit.com/IKEA or see a
                                                 co-worker for more details.


Services and prices may vary, please see  or talk to us in your local IKEA store.


IKEA Projekt Credit Card

Your dream home is now within reach
and more affordable than ever. With
the IKEA Projekt Credit Card*, you don't
have to put off loving every room in
your home.

*Credit card offers are subject to
approval.
IKEA Projekt Credit Card Accounts
are issued by Comenity Capital Bank.

To learn more visit
drop by your local IKEA store.


Valid as of July 1, 2024 posting. Prices and availability of products are subject to change
without notice. Please see  or your local IKEA store for the most up to date pricing.

full_text:
Buying guide
Beds


A good day always starts with a good night
Feeling your best when you wake up starts with the right bed. In this buying guide,
you will find all our beds, including bed frames with and without storage, day beds,
loft beds, bunk beds and upholstered beds. You will also get an overview of our bed
accessories, such as headboards and bed storage boxes.

Of course, a bed is not complete without a mattress and bedding. You can test and
find the best mattress for you in the mattress studio. The textiles department has a
wide range of comforters, pillows and bed linen.


com. For more detailed product information, see the price tag or visit

How to buy a complete bed
                                 A complete bed frame with mattress
                                             consists of these parts:

                                                                                               1. Choose a bed frame and size.
                                      5                                                                                  2. SKORVA midbeam (art nr 901.245.34) is needed for most
                                                                                                    full, queen and king beds. It is is picked up separately in the
                                      4                             self-serve furniture area. For upholstered bed frames, the
                                                       midbeam is included in the packaging.

                                                                                3. For most bed frames, you will also need to choose a slatted                                      3
                                                           bed base, see more on page 8. For some upholstered
                                                                  bedframes, the slatted bed base is included in the price and
                                                                    packaging.

                                                                                4. Choose a mattress or use the one you have at home. You can                                  2
                                                                            find the best one for you in the mattress studio.

                                                                                5. Add a mattress pad of your choice for a softer sleeping
                                                   1                          surface.

                                    Bed configurator
                                                              Design the bed of your dreams (so easy, you can do it).
                                                                           Start planning today at:

Slatted bed bases

Combined with a bed frame, slatted bed-bases can be used as a base for spring, foam and latex mattresses. They help your mattress
last longer and stay comfortable by absorbing most of the stress and weight placed on your bed.

Day beds
Daybed frames

Daybeds extend to make two twin sized beds. We recommend
using two twin ÅGOTNES or ÅSVANG foam mattresses or two
twin VANNAREID spring mattresses. Slatted bed base is included
and SKORVA midbeam is not needed for daybeds.

bunk. Loft beds provide sleeping for one, with space under-             protective. So use a mattress that is the right thickness for a
neath for storage, play or study. Both are single beds.                      loft bed or top bunk.

SERVICES

IKEA products are designed to be taken home and assembled by you. That way, you'll save the most money. But if you would like some
help, we can offer a range of services. Assembly and delivery services fulfilled by an Independent Service Provider.
Contact your local IKEA store or visit the IKEA website for details:


DELIVERY SERVICE                           TASKRABBIT ASSEMBLY SERVICE
Most of our products are designed and                   All IKEA products are designed to be
packaged so that you can take them                assembled by you, but you don't have
home yourself. If you prefer, we can                      to. We've partnered with TaskRabbit
arrange for delivery of your purchases                to connect you with a network of
directly to your home or business. Same             independent 'Taskers' who can provide
day, next day or same week deliveries                quick and convenient assembly and
are available. We can also arrange for              mounting services for your IKEA
delivery at a later date if you would like.              purchases made online and in stores.
                                             You can schedule assembly service
                                                         for as soon as the same day, with
                                                  the Tasker of your choice. Visit
                                                 TaskRabbit.com/IKEA or see a
                                                 co-worker for more details.


Services and prices may vary, please see  or talk to us in your local IKEA store.


IKEA Projekt Credit Card

Your dream home is now within reach
and more affordable than ever. With
the IKEA Projekt Credit Card*, you don't
have to put off loving every room in
your home.

*Credit card offers are subject to
approval.
IKEA Projekt Credit Card Accounts
are issued by Comenity Capital Bank.

To learn more visit
drop by your local IKEA store.

without notice. Please see  or your local IKEA store for the most up to date pricing.

SERVICES

IKEA products are designed to be taken home and assembled by you. That way, you'll save the most money. But if you would like some
help, we can offer a range of services. Assembly and delivery services fulfilled by an Independent Service Provider.
Contact your local IKEA store or visit the IKEA website for details:

day, next day or same week deliveries                quick and convenient assembly and
are available. We can also arrange for              mounting services for your IKEA
delivery at a later date if you would like.              purchases made online and in stores.
